creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to gosha-necr from comment #2)
> Ok, Guido, when I see Makefile, I see USE_SDL=sdl2, but when I install
> games/0ad, it stops with sdl2-config not found error.
> Maybe it happens because I have devel/sdl12 installed as dependency for
> other ports? And know USE_SDL=sdl2 mistakes with that situation?

There is no conflict between the two sdl version. They can live on the same system.

If you send me a full build log I can have a look. But it looks like a local problem on your system.

Maybe you have some corrupt file. Have you tried fetching a fresh ports tree?
